Jakarta Faces API v5.0-M1
  1. jakarta.faces.validator

Uses of Package
jakarta.faces.validator

Packages that use jakarta.faces.validator
Package
Description
jakarta.faces.application
 
jakarta.faces.component
 
jakarta.faces.validator
 
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.validator used by jakarta.faces.application
    Class
    Description
    Validator
    A Validator implementation is a class that can perform validation (correctness checks) on a EditableValueHolder.
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.validator used by jakarta.faces.component
    Class
    Description
    Validator
    A Validator implementation is a class that can perform validation (correctness checks) on a EditableValueHolder.
  • Classes in jakarta.faces.validator used by jakarta.faces.validator
    Class
    Description
    FacesValidator
    The presence of this annotation on a class automatically registers the class with the runtime as a Validator.
    FacesValidator.Literal
    Supports inline instantiation of the FacesValidator qualifier.
    Validator
    A Validator implementation is a class that can perform validation (correctness checks) on a EditableValueHolder.
    ValidatorException
    A ValidatorException is an exception thrown by the validate() method of a Validator to indicate that validation failed.

Comments to: faces-dev@eclipse.org.
